appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for CLI and Browser surfaces to document isolation and shared-boundary rules for validation subagents.

frictions.description: The global ~/.factory/library/user-testing.md path referenced by the mission prompt did not exist in this environment; the equivalent committed repo copy at .factory/library/user-testing.md was used instead.
frictions.resolution: Read the repository-local user-testing guidance file and followed its CLI surface instructions.
